title: Gleiberg
summary:
Gleiberg may refer to:

The Gleiberg volcano, in Hesse, Germany
Krofdorf-Gleiberg, a settlement in Hesse, Germany
Gerberga of Gleiberg (970 - 1036?), a German noblewoman
